Package org.eventb.internal.core.lexer

Class GenLexer

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.lexer.GenLexer
All Implemented Interfaces:
ILexer
public class GenLexer extends Object implements ILexer
Generic lexer for any BMath grammar (potentially extended).

    Reads a single lexem.

    • isIdent

      public static boolean isIdent(String str)
      Tells whether the given string looks like an identifier.
      Parameters:
      str - a string of characters
      Returns:
      true if the given string could be scanned as an identifier

    • isSymbol

      public static boolean isSymbol(String str)
      Tells whether the given string is purely symbolic.
      Parameters:
      str - a string of characters
      Returns:
      true if the given string is purely symbolic

      Returns:
      the saved state of this lexer

      Restore from a previously saved state

      restore in interface ILexer
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      a token

    • makeEOF

      public Token makeEOF()
      Description copied from interface: ILexer
      Returns an end-of-file token at the current position. Useful when lexing is broken and we cannot recover from previous errors.
      Specified by:
      makeEOF in interface ILexer
      Returns:
      an end-of-file token
